reasoning: The control 3.1.4 from NIST 800-171 focuses on separating duties to reduce the risk of malevolent activity. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved by enforcing RBAC policies that prevent any single user or service account from having excessive privileges, such as cluster-admin rights. Ensuring that roles are separated and that least privilege is enforced aligns with the control's intent to prevent collusion and unauthorized access.
title: 3_1_4: 3.1.4 Separate the duties of individuals to reduce the risk of malevolent activity without collusion
